panels.title: RVs
panels.description: Current matching RVs.

panels.title: RVRs
panels.description: Current matching RVRs.

panels.title: RVAs
panels.description: Current matching RVAs.

panels.title: Unhealthy RVRs
panels.description: Current RVRs in degraded-like phases.

panels.title: Deleting RVs
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVs with deletionTimestamp. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: Deleting RVRs
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVRs with deletionTimestamp. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: RV Initial Formation Duration Avg
panels.description: Average RV initial formation time over the selected dashboard range. Uses completed RV initial formation observations only.

panels.title: RV Initial Formation Duration P90
panels.description: P90 RV initial formation time over the selected dashboard range. Uses completed RV initial formation observations only.

panels.title: RVR Backing Volume Duration P90
panels.description: P90 time from RVR creation to BackingVolumeReady over the selected dashboard range. Useful as LLV/LVM provisioning proxy; thresholds are intentionally conservative and may depend on volume size/backend.

panels.title: RV Count by Storage Class
panels.description: Current RV count by storage class plus total. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden to reduce cache-lag noise.

panels.title: RVR Count by Storage Class
panels.description: Current RVR count by storage class plus total. Node selector still filters the scope, but the graph does not split series by node. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden to reduce cache-lag noise.

panels.title: RVA Count by Storage Class
panels.description: Current RVA count by storage class plus total. Node selector still filters the scope, but the graph does not split series by node. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden to reduce cache-lag noise.

panels.title: RVR Count by Node
panels.description: Current RVR counts by node and storage class. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RVA Count by Node
panels.description: Current RVA counts by node and storage class. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RVR Count by Node / Phase
panels.description: Current non-zero RVR count split by node, storage class, and phase. Controlled by the RVR Phase selector. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RVA Count by Node / Phase
panels.description: Current non-zero RVA count split by node, storage class, and phase. Controlled by the RVA Phase selector. Series with storage_class="unknown" are hidden because they are usually temporary cache-lag noise before the object can be matched to its storage class.

panels.title: RV Initial Formation Duration P90
panels.description: P90 time from RV creation to first completed initial datamesh formation. Completion is detected like CSI readiness: datameshRevision > 0 and no active Formation transition. This is not RV IOReady.

panels.title: RV Initial Formation Completed Count
panels.description: Completed initial formation observations in each dashboard rate interval. Use this to see how many RV create operations reached the first formed datamesh state.

panels.title: RV Initial Formation Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed RV initial formation observations: healthy <=10s, slow >10s and <=40s, too slow >40s.

panels.title: RVR Backing Volume Duration P90
panels.description: P90 time from RVR creation to BackingVolumeReady, used as LLV/LVM provisioning proxy. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

panels.title: RVR Backing Volume Completed Count
panels.description: Completed BackingVolumeReady observations in each dashboard rate interval. Compare with RVR phases to see whether provisioning is moving.

panels.title: RVR Backing Volume Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed BackingVolumeReady observations: healthy <=5s, slow >5s and <=20s, too slow >20s.

panels.title: DRBDResource Configured Duration P90
panels.description: Time from DRBDResource creation to Configured=True. This includes agent reconcile latency, DRBD configuration, and status update latency; it is not raw DRBD runtime replication state.

panels.title: DRBDResource Configured Completed Count
panels.description: Completed DRBDResource configure events in each dashboard rate interval. Configured means DRBDResource creation -> Configured=True.

panels.title: DRBDResource Configured Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed DRBDResource configure durations: DRBDResource creation -> Configured=True. Healthy <=2s, slow >2s and <=8s, too slow >8s; wider buckets are debug boundaries, not acceptable time.

targets.expr: clamp_min(sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_configured_duration_seconds_bucket{le="8"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_configured_duration_seconds_bucket{le="2"}[$__rate_interval])), 0) or vector(0)

clamp_min(sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_configured_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_configured_duration_seconds_bucket{le="8"}[$__rate_interval])), 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: RVR Ready Transition Duration P10
panels.description: P10 duration of RVR Ready condition transitions from non-True to True. This highlights the fastest successful transitions and can help spot very fast recovery/flap patterns. Deleting RVRs are excluded.

panels.title: RVR Ready Transition Duration Avg
panels.description: Average duration of RVR Ready condition transitions from non-True to True. Use together with P10/P90 to understand whether slow transitions are isolated or common.

panels.title: RVR Ready Transition Duration P90
panels.description: P90 duration of RVR Ready condition transitions from non-True to True. This highlights slow starts or recoveries. Deleting RVRs are excluded.

panels.title: RVR Ready Transition Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed RVR Ready transitions: healthy <=5s, slow >5s and <=20s, too slow >20s.

panels.title: RVR Ready Transition Completed Count by Node
panels.description: Ready transitions completed in each dashboard rate interval by node. Compare with cluster total to spot flapping concentrated on one node.

panels.title: Datamesh Completed Transition Count
panels.description: Completed Datamesh transitions in each dashboard rate interval by storage class, node, and type. Zero-only series are hidden unless they had activity during the selected interval.

targets.expr: sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__rate_interval])) and on(storage_class, node, type) (sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__range])) > 0)

panels.title: Datamesh Transition / Step Duration P90
panels.description: Datamesh transition and step duration. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.90, sum(rate(sds_rv_datamesh_step_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, storage_class, node, type, step))

panels.title: Datamesh Formation Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed Datamesh Formation transitions: healthy <=10s, slow >10s and <=40s, too slow >40s.

panels.title: Datamesh Non-Formation Duration Bands by Type
panels.description: Completed non-Formation Datamesh transitions by type: healthy <=5s, slow >5s and <=20s, too slow >20s. Use the transition_type filter to reduce noise.

targets.expr: clamp_min((sum by (type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transition_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",type!="Formation",le="20"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transition_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",type!="Formation",le="5"}[$__rate_interval]))), 0) or vector(0)

clamp_min((sum by (type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transition_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",type!="Formation",le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transition_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",type!="Formation",le="20"}[$__rate_interval]))), 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Datamesh Step Duration Bands by Type and Step
panels.description: Completed Datamesh steps by type and step: healthy <=5s, slow >5s and <=20s, too slow >20s. Use filters to reduce noise.

targets.expr: clamp_min((sum by (type, step) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_step_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",le="20"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (type, step) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_step_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",le="5"}[$__rate_interval]))), 0) or vector(0)

clamp_min((sum by (type, step) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_step_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (type, step) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_step_duration_seconds_bucket{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type",le="20"}[$__rate_interval]))), 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Datamesh Transitions
panels.description: Active Datamesh transitions and completed transition count per dashboard rate interval. Series are shown only after they were non-zero during the selected interval.

targets.expr: sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__rate_interval])) and on(storage_class, node, type) (sum by (storage_class, node, type) (increase(sds_rv_datamesh_transitions_completed_total{storage_class=~"$storage_class",node=~"$node|global|unknown",type=~"$transition_type"}[$__range])) > 0)

panels.title: RVA Ready / Detach Duration P90
panels.description: RVA attach and detach duration by node. No data means there were no completed operations in the selected range.

panels.title: RVA Ready / Detach Completed Count
panels.description: Completed RVA attach and detach operations in each dashboard rate interval.

panels.title: RVA Ready Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed RVA attach observations: healthy <=10s, slow >10s and <=40s, too slow >40s.

panels.title: RVA Detach Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed RVA detach observations: healthy <=5s, slow >5s and <=20s, too slow >20s.

panels.title: RV Deletion Duration P90
panels.description: P90 and average time from RV deletionTimestamp to finalizer removal. No data means there were no completed RV deletions in the selected range.

panels.title: RV Deletion Completed Count
panels.description: Completed RV deletions in each dashboard rate interval. Compare with current deleting count: growing current with low completed count points to stuck deletion.

panels.title: RV Deletion Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed RV deletion observations: healthy <=10s, slow >10s and <=40s, too slow >40s.

panels.title: RVR Deletion Duration P90
panels.description: P90 and average time from RVR deletionTimestamp to finalizer removal, including per-node RVR p90. No data means there were no completed RVR deletions in the selected range.

panels.title: RVR Deletion Completed Count
panels.description: Completed RVR deletions in each dashboard rate interval. Compare with current deleting count: growing current with low completed count points to stuck deletion.

panels.title: RVR Deletion Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed RVR deletion observations: healthy <=10s, slow >10s and <=40s, too slow >40s.

panels.title: DRBDResource Deletion Duration P90
panels.description: Time from DRBDResource deletionTimestamp to agent finalizer removal. This isolates agent-side DRBDResource cleanup duration, not overall RVR deletion time.

panels.title: DRBDResource Deletion Completed Count
panels.description: Completed DRBDResource deletion events in each dashboard rate interval: deletionTimestamp -> agent finalizer removed.

panels.title: DRBDResource Deletion Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed DRBDResource deletion observations: deletionTimestamp -> agent finalizer removed; healthy <=5s, slow >5s and <=20s, too slow >20s.

targets.expr: clamp_min(sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_deletion_duration_seconds_bucket{le="20"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_deletion_duration_seconds_bucket{le="5"}[$__rate_interval])), 0) or vector(0)

clamp_min(sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_deletion_duration_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf"}[$__rate_interval])) - sum by (node) (increase(sds_drbdr_deletion_duration_seconds_bucket{le="20"}[$__rate_interval])), 0) or vector(0)

panels.title: Deleting RV Current Count by Storage Class
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVs with deletionTimestamp by storage class. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: Deleting RVR Current Count by Node and Storage Class
panels.description: Scrape-time count of RVRs with deletionTimestamp by node and storage class. Short deletes can happen between scrapes; sustained non-zero values likely mean deletion is stuck.

panels.title: DRBD Runtime Problem Count
panels.description: Current DRBD runtime problems from DRBD exporter: bad connection state, missing quorum, and unintentionally diskless devices. This is runtime state, not DRBDResource CR lifecycle.

targets.expr: sum by (node) (drbd_connection_state{node=~"$node",drbd_connection_state!="UpToDate",drbd_connection_state!="Connected"} == 1) or on(node) (0 * sum by (node) (drbd_connection_state{node=~"$node"}))
sum by (node) (drbd_device_quorum{node=~"$node"} == 0) or on(node) (0 * sum by (node) (drbd_device_quorum{node=~"$node"}))
sum by (node) (drbd_device_unintentionaldiskless{node=~"$node"} == 1) or on(node) (0 * sum by (node) (drbd_device_unintentionaldiskless{node=~"$node"}))

panels.title: DRBD Runtime Out-of-Sync Bytes
panels.description: Existing DRBD exporter metric aligned with DRBD alert rules. Non-zero values indicate replication lag. This is runtime state, not DRBDResource CR lifecycle.

panels.title: Metrics Collector Duration P90
panels.description: Duration of SDS current metrics collector runs. Use this together with Prometheus scrape duration if the /metrics target becomes slow.

panels.title: Metrics Collector Objects
panels.description: Number of objects processed by the current metrics collector by kind.

panels.title: Metrics Collector Errors
panels.description: Collector errors over the selected range.

panels.title: Prometheus Scrape Duration
panels.description: Prometheus-side scrape duration for likely SDS/controller targets. This includes the whole /metrics endpoint, not only the current metrics collector.

panels.title: Metrics Collector Duration Bands
panels.description: Completed collector runs: healthy <=0.05s, slow 0.05-0.25s, too slow >0.25s.
